title: From golden carrots to food!
description: With this resource pack you can change the appearance of golden carrots into 5 types of food!
body:
Using this resource pack you can change the appearance of the golden morkoai into 5 types of food (using an anvil): Ice cream / popsicles / kebabs / banana and cherry pie / Chocolate.

This resource pack works with the support of Optifine!
Or you need to use mods that replace it.

 The resource pack folder will contain the names of the food.
